summary: Base W10 (~18 mpw, §4.C) — second post-deload step-up under the permanent Tue-lift / Wed-T / Thu-off template (Adj #92). Tue Hyp A logged: incline holds 145 (top of LP, +5→150 only on a cleaner set-3, Adj #107), rear-delt 130 bump landed (set 1 RIR 3 = prescribed, Adj #112), and both arm resets validated — preacher 60 ran clean (bump-eligible 65, Adj #109) and pushdown 20 cleared its hold (22.5 re-attempt eligible, pain-gated — elbow mild ≤4/10, §10.A clock stays reset, Adj #110). Up next Wed: threshold 2×15 @ T — hold the 8:00/mi lock (Adj #77/#93 nudge held on the cooler-weather confounder), anchor RPE ≤7. Keep easy days genuinely easy after Fri's 8:59 creep (Adj #96/#105); the tighter Wed→Fri spacing + v4.3 reshape raise the intensity fraction. Owed fresh-day run-MHR max test still rolls forward this week as its own session, not a finisher (Adj #9/#53/#93). Sat queued: lat 160 (Adj #97), seated calf 345-eligible (Adj #102), Sat DB lat push toward 15 (Adj #99), chest fly bump-eligible (Adj #103). Holds: chest-supp row 75 reset (Adj #98), decline crunch BW (Adj #111).
